w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: 4 X BA CREWS – LEFT AND RIGHT HAND WALL
DELIVER CUSTOMER LIST (MR SHORTS UNIT NO.)
HOLDS BMA TAG (NO CURRENT ISSUES WITH WATER)
NAL MEASURES IN PLACE AS DIRECTED (i.e. AERIAL, GROUND MONITORS, JETS)
LIGHT SMOKE STILL GOING TOWADS PYLON
MR SHORT IS NOW ACCOUNTED FOR
THICK BLACK SMOKE NOW SEEN COMING FROM ROOF
CANDIDATE TO HANDOVER COMMAND TO DAC
CANDIDATE TO BE ASCORTED OFF SITE AND AWAIT FEEDBACK
Determine suitability and sufficiency of resources
Obtained professional advice to help evaluate
Evaluation of impact on the organisation and others
Actively monitor the progress of activity against your plan
